summary: Tested NEW driver experience upgrade (backend + frontend). Backend: 10/10 new endpoint tests pass + 19/19 P0 regression pass = 29/29. NEW GET /api/driver/performance returns correct shape, types, percent-bounded rates (0-100), and monotonic earnings (total >= week >= today). Frontend: /earnings screen renders correctly with period tabs (Today/This week/All time), green earnings hero that updates per tab, four metric cards (Acceptance/Completion/Rating/Total trips), 'Recent deliveries' section with empty state, and back button. NavigateButton chooser modal works on order screen during enroute stages (Google Maps + Waze visible, Apple Maps correctly absent on web). Driver-home status pill shows lifecycle label ('Job accepted') with amber dot when on active delivery. ONE CRITICAL BUG: /earnings IS appearing as a 5th bottom tab on web preview despite href:null in _layout.tsx — violates the 'must NOT appear as a bottom tab' requirement. JobDetailSheet swipe-to-accept could not be exercised live because demo.driver already has an active in-progress order seeded, but code inspection confirms SwipeToConfirm + Decline link are wired correctly with testIDs. State machine advance accepted->enroute_pickup verified.

ui_bugs.issue: On Expo web preview, the /earnings screen is rendered as a 5th bottom tab (label 'earnings' with chevron-down icon) even though `href: null` is set. Tab buttons array confirmed: ['home','history','wallet','profile','earnings']. Violates requirement 'It must NOT appear as a bottom tab'. Reference: frontend/app/_layout.tsx:101

issues: Period tabs, hero card, and metric cards lack testID attributes — only the entry points on driver-home have testIDs. Recommend adding testID='period-tab-today|week|all', 'earnings-hero', 'metric-acceptance|completion|rating|trips' to enable robust UI tests.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Repeats across screens. Reference: any usage of shadows.sm/md/lg in StyleSheet.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'.

Console warning: '[Layout children]: No route named "+html" exists in nested children'. The Tabs.Screen name='+html' declaration in _layout.tsx:113 does not match the actual file +html.tsx routing. Reference: frontend/app/_layout.tsx:113.

action_items: Fix /earnings bottom-tab leak on web: replace `href: null` with `tabBarButton: () => null` (or `tabBarItemStyle: { display: 'none' }`) for the earnings Tabs.Screen entry, OR move /earnings out of the (tabs) group entirely so it doesn't register a tab button. Verify with: log in as driver -> bottom bar must show only 4 items (Home, History, Wallet, Profile).

Apply the same fix to the other hidden-screen entries in _layout.tsx (order, summary, kyc, onboarding, login, chat, shipper-*, admin) — they may share the same web tab-leak issue. Test by inspecting `[role="tab"]` list.
Add testID to /earnings interactive elements: period tabs, hero card, metric cards, recent-delivery rows (and empty state) for stable automated testing.
Clean up the '+html' Tabs.Screen entry in _layout.tsx:113 — currently triggers a React Native warning. Either remove the entry or rename to match an actual file.
Migrate deprecated `shadow*` style props in theme/shadows to `boxShadow` (or use Platform.select for web) and update `pointerEvents` prop to `style.pointerEvents`.

RETEST after fix: anti-mistap SwipeToConfirm could not be exercised live because demo.driver already has an active in-progress order. Either (a) seed-demo should reset demo driver to no-active-order state, or (b) create a fresh pending order as demo.shipper and ensure it surfaces to demo.driver on driver-home for the swipe-to-accept flow.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/app/_layout.tsx:99-112: hidden screens rely on `href: null` which does not hide tabs on web — switch to `tabBarButton: () => null`.
frontend/app/earnings.tsx: missing testIDs on period tabs and metric cards reduces testability.
backend/server.py is 4035 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; should be split into routers (driver, shipper, orders, auth, performance) for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (5/6 verified: /earnings UI ✓, status pill ✓, NavigateButton chooser ✓, no-bottom-tab ✗, swipe-to-accept could-not-test, regression ✓)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests call POST /api/seed-demo (idempotent) once per session; shipment-creation tests prefix all data with TEST_ for easy cleanup. No persistent test data created beyond what seed-demo already provides.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo driver demo.driver@nadaruns.com / demo1234 starts in an ACTIVE order state (status=accepted, then advanced to enroute_pickup during my test). To exercise the JobDetailSheet swipe-to-accept, you must either (a) complete the current active order all the way to delivered first, or (b) hit POST /api/seed-demo to reset, then create a new pending shipment as demo.shipper. The /earnings screen is reachable at /earnings even when bottom-tab bug is fixed (linked via testID=open-performance-offline / open-performance / open-performance-link on driver-home). NavigateButton only renders when order.status is in ['enroute_pickup','enroute_dropoff'] — not in 'accepted'.
rca_of_issue: Earnings bottom-tab leak — Expo Router on web does not hide Tabs.Screen entries that use `href: null`; it still renders a tab button using the screen name as label and a default chevron icon. Reproduction: log in as driver -> inspect document.querySelectorAll('[role="tab"]') -> array contains 5 items including 'earnings'. Fix: replace `options={{ href: null, ... }}` with `options={{ href: null, tabBarButton: () => null }}` for every hidden screen in /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx (lines 100-112).
